items.title: Warsh Caught Between Trump and Bond Market Betting on Rate Hikes
EXCLUSIVE : Nicholas Irving : War at 100 Days , Could Last to 2027 , Trump Avoids Escalation ( Full Interview )
Deal is reached to end Iran war and Trump orders stop to US naval blockade
UK, France, Germany Ready to Lift Relevant Iran Sanctions
items.summary: “We are prepared to lift relevant sanctions in response to clear, verifiable steps by Iran on its nuclear programme,” according to a joint statement from the leaders of the UK, France, Germany and Italy.

items.title: Japanese Stocks Set to Rise After US-Iran Peace Deal Reached
items.summary: Japanese stocks are set to gain after President Donald Trump said the US and Iran have reached a peace deal, raising hopes the Middle East war is nearing an end and the Strait of Hormuz will reopen.

items.title: Deal is reached to end Iran war and Trump orders stop to US naval blockade
US and Iran Agree to Deal Halting War
items.summary: The US and Iran reached an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, halting a war that killed thousands of people and setting the stage for negotiations on the fate of Iran's nuclear program. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: US - Iran war ends : How peace deal impacts Strait of Hormuz , nuclear program
Vanguard's Wang on Iran-US Deal Economic Impact
items.summary:
Qian Wang, Chief APAC Economist at Vanguard Group, discusses the US and Iran agreement to a deal that will halt war and says while there is still significant uncertainty around how sustainable the current deal is, it could boost the outlook for the global economy.
She speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: AGSI's Roebuck on US-Iran Deal
items.summary:
William Roebuck, Former US Ambassador to Bahrian and Executive Vice President at Arab Gulf States Institute, discusses his outlook for the agreement between US and Iran to halt the war. He says the conflict is "moving into a new stage" and that is towards a "diplomatic track".
He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Deal is reached to end Iran war and Trump orders stop to US naval blockade
Deal is reached to end Iran war ; Trump orders stop to US naval blockade
Treasuries Rally as Traders Trim Fed Hike Bets After Iran Deal
items.summary: Treasuries advanced across the curve as investors dialed back expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes following news of a deal to end the Iran war.

items.title: Yen Short Bets Jump to Nine-Year High as Carry Trade Revives
items.summary: Speculators have boosted their bets against the yen to a nine-year high, signaling the revival of the yen carry trade despite intervention risks and a potential rate hike by the Bank of Japan on Tuesday.

items.title:
President Trump @POTUS and I had a very good conversation today on many key topics: the war, its roots, diplomatic opportunities, and the positions of our partners. 

President Trump’s remarks were absolutely spot-on, particularly regarding our Crimea: it was Russia’s seizure of Crimea that started it all, and if there had been strong leadership back then, this entire war simply wouldn’t have happened.

All Ukrainians have one wish for President Trump: that we may finally achieve peace, and achieve this success together with the U.S. and all our partners. This is the most important thing we want, and it is crucial that American society is fully supporting this Ukrainian aspiration for a dignified peace.

items.title: Iran war update , today : Trump and Pakistan say deal could be signed Sunday but Tehran signals more time is needed

I have just had a great conversation with @POTUS. I congratulated President Trump on his birthday, and we have had quite a detailed discussion about many key things – peace, surely, was among them. I wished President Trump every success, above all in his work to end Russia’s war against Ukraine. I also thanked him for all the support America has been providing to Ukraine, and it does matter that we remember with gratitude every step of that support – from Javelins to Patriots.

We discussed things that could help bring about peace now, and I informed the President about the latest developments on the battlefield and how our position has strengthened. We agreed that we will discuss more during our meeting at the G7 Summit. We have some good ideas that could help advance peace and protect lives. Thank you!
